headline: Crown Castle (CCI) Q1 2025 Earnings Transcript
summary: To help realize that value, while in this role, my top priorities are facilitating the successful and efficient close of the small cell and fiber solution sale, delivering on the company's financial and operating objectives for 2025 and positioning the tower business to maximize value for shareholders on a standalone basis.  Additionally, although we are in the early phases, we are making good progress towards separating our fiber solutions and small cell businesses so that we can close the sale in the first half of 2026.
